title: 1.1 Lists core HTTP timing metrics including 'http_req_duration' with values in milliseconds (ms)
1.3 Describes or shows a minimal k6 test script structure with an HTTP request (e.g., importing 'k6/http' and using http.get() in an exported default function)
1.4 Specifies that output files like 'results.json' or 'results.csv' can be created using --out flags
1.6 Lists 'data_received' and 'data_sent' metrics with their units in kilobytes (kB) or bytes (B)
1.7 Identifies the HTTP protocol version detected during the test request (e.g., HTTP/2.0 or HTTP/1.1)
1.8 States that the k6 run command format is 'k6 run <script>' or './k6 run <script>'
1.9 States that no special environment variables or project configuration files are required to run a k6 script
2.1 Asserts that k6 generates output files (such as JSON or CSV) by default without requiring explicit --out flags
